summary: This topic covers the ERP login process using a phone number and OTP, and provides an overview of the dashboard interface, including company/entity name, user ID, session information, and the permission-based menu structure.
steps: Log in using your registered phone number and the One-Time Password (OTP) received.
Optionally, you can set a password for future logins.
Upon successful login, the dashboard will display your company/entity name, user ID, and the current session.
business_rules: Login is primarily via phone number and OTP.
The menu options displayed on the dashboard are permission-based, meaning different users (e.g., student, fee clerk) will see different options relevant to their roles.
important_notes: The dashboard interface is tailored based on user permissions.
The current session information is displayed at the top.
questions: How do I log in to the ERP system?
What is the correct URL for accessing the ERP?
Why do I see different menu options compared to other users?
Can I set a password for my ERP login?
